nav.lang_switch_aria: Switch to Czech version of the site

closings: Poslušně hlásím, že today's edition is over. The MPs went home and so did we.
The pub is closing. The next edition comes after the next session.
Poslušně hlásím, že democracy is a long-distance run, and sometimes a long session too.
The MPs left. The stenographic record stayed.
Poslušně hlásím, že the gavel has sounded in The Chamber of Deputies. We are closing our notebooks.
We fold the diary. The next issue after the next session.

cookie.text: Poslušně hlásím, že we use Google Analytics for visitor statistics, and only with your consent.

subscribe.gloss:
You don't have to go to The Chamber of Deputies.
Leave your e-mail and the diary will come to you.
subscribe.success: Check your e-mail and confirm your subscription.
subscribe.privacy: By subscribing you agree to processing your e-mail address for sending the newsletter.
subscribe.error_invalid: That doesn't look like an e-mail.
subscribe.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.
subscribe.error_send: Subscription could not be sent. Try again in a moment.
subscribe.error_setup: Subscription is being set up. Try again in a few minutes.
subscribe.error_generic: Subscription failed. Check your e-mail and try again.

beer_support.gloss: Poslušně hlásím, že going to The Chamber of Deputies every day is thirsty work.

locale_notice: This edition is in Czech. A satirical diary from real records of the Czech Chamber of Deputies.

archive.title: Edition archive
archive.meta: All diary editions from the Czech Chamber of Deputies, term {obdobi}.
archive.legend: The Chamber of Deputies session number

notfound.title: Page not found · Poslušně hlásím
notfound.meta: This address does not exist on Poslušně hlásím. The archive and newsletter signup are on the homepage.
notfound.heading: Poslušně hlásím: nothing here
notfound.gloss: The address you opened does not exist on this site. The Chamber of Deputies has plenty of agenda items. This is not one of them.
notfound.latest_heading: Or go straight to the latest edition

glossary_page.title: Švejk's glossary · Poslušně hlásím
glossary_page.meta: The Chamber of Deputies has its own language. A glossary for people who don't follow politics every day.
glossary_page.heading: Švejk's glossary
glossary_page.gloss: The Chamber of Deputies has its own language and ordinary people sometimes feel like they're back in the army.

beer_page.title: Buy Švejk a Pint · Poslušně hlásím
beer_page.meta: Voluntary contribution to running the parliamentary diary. The newspaper stays free.
beer_page.heading: Buy Švejk a Pint
beer_page.promise: The newspaper stays free for everyone. A pint is voluntary.
beer_page.fine: Contributions are voluntary and do not entitle you to any consideration.
beer_page.pay_note: Payment is securely processed by Stripe. This site does not store payment details.
beer_page.pay_portal: Already a Štamgast and want to change your card or cancel? Manage your subscription here.

thanks_page.title: Thank you · Poslušně hlásím
thanks_page.meta: Payment for Švejk's pint was received.
thanks_page.quote: Poslušně hlásím, že the pint will be drunk to the health of The Chamber of Deputies.

confirmed_page.title: Subscription confirmed · Poslušně hlásím
confirmed_page.meta: Your Poslušně hlásím newsletter subscription is confirmed.
confirmed_page.heading: Welcome to the newsletter
confirmed_page.gloss: Everything went according to procedure. From the next edition, the parliamentary diary will land in your inbox.
confirmed_page.latest_heading: While you wait for the next edition
confirmed_page.latest_text: The newest edition is already out
confirmed_page.latest_suffix: What MPs passed, what failed, and why it matters.
confirmed_page.expect_text: After each sitting day of The Chamber of Deputies we briefly summarise what was discussed and what it means in practice. No party bias. No political commentary. No TV shouting.
confirmed_page.frequency_text: Only when a new edition comes out. Sometimes several times a week, sometimes not at all. When nothing happens, we send nothing.
confirmed_page.no_marketing_text: No marketing, no weekly reminders. You can unsubscribe anytime.
confirmed_page.note_prefix: This page appears only after confirming your subscription.
confirmed_page.note_reply: Something off? Reply to the confirmation e-mail.

terms_page.title: Terms of use · Poslušně hlásím
terms_page.meta: Rules for using Poslušně hlásím, the newsletter, and voluntary contributions.

privacy_page.title: Privacy policy · Poslušně hlásím
privacy_page.meta: How Poslušně hlásím handles e-mail, cookies, analytics, and voluntary payments.

support_page.title: Customer support · Poslušně hlásím
support_page.meta: Contact and help with newsletter, payments, and the Poslušně hlásím website.

pivo_tiers.rum_note: I don't drink spirits, only rum.
pivo_tiers.stamgast_note: for those who show up regularly, even when there's no alarm

doi.title: Confirm subscription · Poslušně hlásím
doi.intro: The parliamentary diary is waiting. One more step: confirm that this e-mail is really yours and you want the newsletter.
doi.quote_body: without confirmation we cannot send you a single line. Click and it is done.
doi.footer: If you received this e-mail by mistake, you do not need to do anything.
doi.privacy_link: What we do with your e-mail address.
doi.subject: Poslušně hlásím: confirm your subscription
doi.plain_cta: Confirm your subscription using the link in the HTML version of this e-mail.
doi.plain_after_confirm: After confirmation we will redirect you to:

neprosli.title: Who did not pass
neprosli.gloss: {count} nominations for state honours that The Chamber rejected on {date}. Vote totals by party club for each name.
neprosli.note: The Short by column shows how many votes for were still needed for a majority of those present.
neprosli.explain: More votes for than against is not enough. A proposal passes only when votes for exceed half of deputies present in the Chamber. Those who abstained or did not vote count the same as votes against.

prosli.title: Whom The Chamber recommended
prosli.gloss: {count} names that The Chamber sent to the president on {date} as recommendations for honours. Vote totals by party club for each name.
prosli.note: The president has the final word. These are only proposals that won the required majority of those present in the Chamber.
prosli.explain: More votes for than against is not enough. A proposal passes only when votes for exceed half of deputies present in the Chamber. Those who abstained or did not vote count the same as votes against.

zvoleni.title: Whom The Chamber elected to the CT Council
zvoleni.gloss: {count} new members of the Council of Czech Television that The Chamber filled on {date} in a public vote. Vote totals by party club for each name.
zvoleni.note: The vote was public. Election required more votes for than against and a quorum of deputies present.
zvoleni.explain: To be elected, a candidate had to receive more votes for than against and meet the quorum of deputies present.
